Rhythm Key Dash

Tap the Beat & Rush the Keys

A fast-paced music tapping game that tests your reflexes and timing.

Screenshots

About the Game

Rhythm Key Dash is a fast-paced music tapping game that tests your reflexes and timing.

Watch the keys fall and tap them at the right moment to play the melody. Miss a key and the music stops — stay focused and keep the rhythm going!

Features

  • Intuitive one-touch tap controls
  • Falling key gameplay with increasing speed
  • Beautiful dark-themed neon visuals
  • Multiple songs and difficulty levels
  • Score tracking with combo multipliers
  • Completely offline — play anywhere

Support

If you have questions, feedback, or need help with Rhythm Key Dash, use the support link on the App Store product page.

For bug reports, include your device model, iOS version, and a short description of the issue.

Privacy Policy

FAQ

How do I play?

Tap each falling key as it reaches the hit zone at the bottom of the screen. Timing matters — the closer to perfect, the higher your score.

Does the app collect personal data?

No. Rhythm Key Dash is an offline game and does not collect personal information.

How do I request support?

Use the support link on the App Store product page with your question or issue details.
